scripts.test:e2e: pnpm run test:e2e:indirect && pnpm run test:e2e:direct
scripts.test:e2e:direct: env -u NO_COLOR -u FORCE_COLOR playwright test --config playwright.direct.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:headed: env -u NO_COLOR -u FORCE_COLOR playwright test --config playwright.indirect.config.ts --headed
scripts.test:e2e:indirect: env -u NO_COLOR -u FORCE_COLOR playwright test --config playwright.indirect.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:ui: env -u NO_COLOR -u FORCE_COLOR PW_SLOWMO_MS=${PW_SLOWMO_MS:-700} playwright test --config playwright.indirect.config.ts --ui
